---
title: "Statistical epidemics in biology"
image: "../images/card_pics/papers.jpg"
description: "We model how analytical fads spread through scientific communities. Viewing statistics as “epidemics” helps identify and mitigate collective biases in data analysis and interpretation."
categories: ["Project PROBE"]
contributors: "Kaitlyn McKnight, Janette Davidson"
feature_order: "l"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
